violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be between 200-400 ppm. PIC replenished sanitizer and retested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (spoon) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed in 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025
Inspector observed a heavy accumulation of leaf litter, boxes, and other debris around the refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

Spray containers of chemicals was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the counter and storage racks in drive thru beverage station and the cabinets in the dining room beverage station area has an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The outside back refuse area including the border along fence observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, food debris, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
